integration_validation_v2.gap: MT-191 requires Flight Recorder events for tool calls/proposals/apply decisions. The FR event registry is WP-KERNEL-004 work and only defines checkpoint/replay/restart-resume events; no tool/proposal/apply event exists. Cited mt_191_* tests exercise the checkpoint WRITER, not tool/proposal/apply FR events.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/flight_recorder/fr_event_registry.rs:46 (FR_EVENT_REGISTRY_ADDED_IN_WP = "WP-KERNEL-004"); fr_event_registry.rs:84,139 (only RestartResume*/checkpoint events; no tool/proposal/apply); tests/session_checkpoint_tests.rs:703-1226 (mt_191_adversarial tests target CheckpointWriter)

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-191 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Flight Recorder Tool Proposal And Apply Events -- Define Flight Recorder events for tool calls
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Flight Recorder Tool Proposal And Apply Events
scope.summary: MT-191 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Flight Recorder Tool Proposal And Apply Events -- Define Flight Recorder events for tool calls, proposals, apply decisions only.
